manifest.name: Short after pump (injected ETHUSDT failure)
manifest.summary: Шорт после резкого роста цены при достаточном объёме; ETHUSDT throws (Task 9 fail-closed golden).
manifest.rationale: Task 9 fail-closed golden: ETHUSDT's onBarClose always throws so the harness catches it and the session latches that symbol to fail-closed, while other symbols run the normal short_after_pump logic.
manifest.author: agent
